label: Land
theme: Distributed sensing · forward infrastructure · austere operations
text: Persistent ground-based awareness and support infrastructure for contested, remote, and mission-critical environments.
alt: A ridgeline sensing and support installation overlooking the coastal approaches at first light.

label: Air
theme: Reach · ISR · communications relay · persistent observation
text: Air-domain programs focused on reach, sensing, communications, and autonomous systems support.
alt: A long-endurance uncrewed aircraft holding station above the cloud deck at dusk.

label: Sea
theme: Maritime awareness · offshore infrastructure · sensor fusion
text: Maritime programs built for persistent awareness, distributed sensing, and lower-burden operational coverage.
alt: An offshore sensing mast standing watch over dark open water at night, distant contacts on the horizon.
